hero.slogan: The Guzzi Soul, Every Way You Go.
hero.description: In the heart of Lake Como, where a legend on two wheels was born in 1921, Mandello del Lario stands as the world capital of historic motorcycle tourism. MOVE GO is the digital platform that celebrates this unique heritage, uniting tradition, innovation and global community in a real-time tourism ecosystem.
